item.text: I’ll make the smallest schema and CRUD change, then run the provided tests against the existing database.

item.aggregated_output:
npm notice run build-bench-mongo-schema-evolution@1.0.0 test
npm notice run node tests/acceptance.test.mjs
Build-Bench brownfield acceptance passed: mongo/schema-evolution

item.text:
Added optional `riskScore` validation (`int`, 0–100) and evolved existing collections with `collMod`.

`createAccounts`, `getAccounts`, and `updateAccounts` already pass arbitrary document fields through correctly, so no CRUD rewrite was needed.

Verified: `npm test` passes.
